feedback.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. I believe digital fairness law is right to focus on preventing misleading practices online, as this protects consumers from navigating safely.
